_doc: Standing manual-task definitions for the daily Tasks page (the 🔥 shortlist). build_tasks.py merges these with dynamic reply-queue tasks into site/dashboard/tasks.json. 'daily' reset + graded each day; 'setup' are one-time (persistent).

daily.task: Share today's Booked Job post into 3 local + contractor Facebook Groups
daily.note: Grab the latest post off the page, share it natively into groups you're a member of. The #1 FB growth lever.

daily.task: Answer 2 'who's a good [trade] in [town]?' threads in local Groups
daily.note: Be the helpful local pro — no link-drop. This is the dominant lead path in local Groups.

daily.task: Genuinely answer 2 contractor questions in the trade subs
daily.note: Real help only, zero promo. Reddit is the #1 AI-citation source — being useful here gets us quoted.

daily.task: Reply to 5 bigger trade/SMB accounts (the 70/30 reply-guy method)
daily.note: Replies are THE Threads growth signal. Add a sharp take or a question — be present in the first 30 min.

setup.task: Seed a Consent Resolve review on G2
setup.note: 1–13 reviews jumps AI-citation rate to ~53%. Highest-ROI, one-time.

setup.task: Seed a Consent Resolve review on Capterra
Seed a Consent Resolve review on Trustpilot

setup.note: Channel → Edit → Channel Type → Public. Unlocks discovery. One-time.
